name: First Baptist Church Christian Life Center
description: First Baptist Church Christian Life Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Muskogee, OK. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Spaulding Park
description: Come play pickleball at Spaulding Park in Muskogee, OK! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.
